title: bridge-rust: replace spawner.spawn().unwrap() with error handling
description: firmware/bridge-rust/src/main.rs:91 has spawner.spawn(radio_task().unwrap()). Task spawn failure will panic. Handle gracefully.
notes: Development firmware uses panic_probe. Task spawn failure is rare but possible. For production: log error and continue without radio task if spawn fails.
close_reason: Replaced panic/expect with error logging and graceful degradation (LED blink pattern or continue loop)
